name: Sweet Pumpkin Empanadas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, sugar, salt, and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon in a medium bowl.
2. In a small bowl, beat butter, milk, and one egg. Add to dry ingredients; mix well. Form into a ball and cover; chill for 1 hour.
3. In a medium bowl, combine pumpkin and brown sugar. Add nuts, raisins, lemon juice, water, cinnamon, and cloves; mix well. Divide dough into 12 to 14 portions.
4. On a lightly floured board, roll out each portion into a 6-inch circle. Place scant 1/4 cup pumpkin mixture on each circle.
5. Moisten edges with water; fold in half, pressing edges with a fork to seal. Scallop the sealed edges by indenting at 3/4-inch intervals.
6. Place empanadas on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Beat remaining egg and brush on top of empanadas. Mix cinnamon sugar and sprinkle over empanadas.
8. Bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 15 to 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm or cool on a wire rack.
